title: Of Our Spiritual Strivings
venue: A. C. McClurg and Co., Chicago

license.note: Published 1903; public domain in the United States.

abstract: Of Our Spiritual Strivings (1903), by W. E. B. Du Bois. From The Souls of Black Folk.
excerpt: O water, voice of my heart, crying in the sand, All night long crying with a mournful cry, As I lie and listen, and cannot understand The voice of my heart in my side or the voice of the sea, O water, crying for rest,...
